products.name: Devoko 5-Piece Patio Furniture Set
products.tagline: Budget-friendly rattan-look sectional for small patios
products.what_it_is: A PE wicker conversation set with a loveseat, two chairs, ottoman, and coffee table — ships in multiple boxes.
products.best_for: Covered patios or balconies with limited rain exposure; renters who don't want to invest heavily.
products.stands_out: Strong price-to-appearance ratio; PE wicker is UV-resistant and won't rust like cheap metal frames.
products.before_you_buy: Not designed for full sun + rain year-round — store cushions when not in use.
products.skip_if: Your patio gets heavy weather exposure or you want furniture that lasts 10+ years without care.

products.name: Keter Corfu 4-Piece All-Weather Resin Set
products.tagline: All-weather resin construction that genuinely holds up to rain and sun
products.what_it_is: A 4-piece resin rattan conversation set (2 chairs, loveseat, table) with UV-resistant material that won't rust or rot.
products.best_for: Exposed patios, rainy climates, or anyone who wants low-maintenance seating without seasonal storage.
products.stands_out: Keter resin is meaningfully better than cheap wicker for weather resistance — no cushion storage needed.
products.before_you_buy: Resin has less give than cushioned options; comfort depends on sitting casually vs. lounging for hours.
products.skip_if: You want deep, cushioned seating for long outdoor sessions.

products.name: GRAND PATIO 5-Piece Outdoor Dining Set
products.tagline: Mid-range outdoor dining table and chairs for regular use
products.what_it_is: A 5-piece outdoor dining set with a tempered glass table and 4 padded chairs — seats 4 comfortably.
products.best_for: Patios where you primarily eat outside; fits 4 people at a proper dining height.
products.stands_out: Dining-height outdoor sets are harder to find at a reasonable price — this fills the gap well.
products.before_you_buy: Glass tabletops need occasional cleaning and should be covered or stored in severe weather.
products.skip_if: You want a lounge/sectional setup rather than a dining configuration.
